query:
SELECT id, videoUrl, videoPrompt, videoStatus, createdAt
FROM concerts
WHERE videoUrl IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    LOWER(videoPrompt) LIKE '%fog%'
    OR LOWER(videoUrl) LIKE '%fog%'
  )
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
